title: Classes extending java.lang.Thread should provide a specific "run" behavior
description: When extending java.lang.Thread, you should override the run method or pass a Runnable target to the constructor of java.lang.Thread.
recommendation: Override the run method or pass a Runnable target to the constructor of java.lang.Thread.
impact: The default implementation of java.lang.Thread 's run will only perform a task passed as a Runnable. If no Runnable has been provided at construction time, then the thread will not perform any action.

checks.message: Classes extending Thread should override the run() method
